blocks.text: Linda Gallegos, with Brenda Rodriguez copied:

A short status and one request. We have the organization charts and the first set of management accounts, and Brenda Rodriguez has started reconciling the cost of the current structure against them. The interviews with your business-unit heads are set for the next two weeks. That is where most of the diagnostic on {{fact:f:E-2008-001.client}} will be decided, so please hold those slots even if the week gets busy.

The one thing we are missing is the management accounts broken out by cost center instead of by legal entity. Brenda Rodriguez can work from either, but the cost-center cut lets us tie spend to the structure instead of to the balance sheet, which is the whole point of the baseline. If your finance team can send that by the end of the week, we stay on schedule.
Nothing else needed from you today. I will send the interview list tomorrow with the times, so your assistants can put them on calendars.
